note: Live risk-gallery fixtures deployed on Pharos Atlantic. Each contract is engineered to light up a distinct Sentinel signal, forming a monotonic safe -> caution -> dangerous spectrum. Verdicts are reproduced live by gallery.py (read-only).

exhibits.name: CleanToken
exhibits.signal: clean ERC-20, no privileged owner (baseline — Sentinel does not cry wolf)

exhibits.name: MinimalProxy
exhibits.signal: EIP-1167 minimal proxy detected — logic lives in a fixed implementation

exhibits.name: TinyStub
exhibits.signal: tiny-bytecode stub/trap rather than a working contract

exhibits.name: ZeroSupplyToken
exhibits.signal: zero-supply token trap + single EOA owner

exhibits.name: UpgradeableProxy
exhibits.signal: EIP-1967 upgradeable proxy + EOA owner + currently paused

exhibits.name: Backdoor
exhibits.signal: SELFDESTRUCT + unguarded DELEGATECALL + paused + EOA owner
